description_long: This is a plain, light brown paper grocery bag with a rectangular shape and a flat base, commonly used for carrying groceries or other items. The bag features visible horizontal creases and subtle wrinkles, indicating it is made from thin, flexible kraft paper. The top edge is straight and unadorned, with no visible handles or reinforcements, and the sides are sharply folded, giving the bag a crisp, geometric appearance. The surface is matte and uncoated, with a natural, slightly fibrous texture typical of untreated paper. There are no visible logos, branding, or printed designs on any side of the bag. The bag appears empty, as its sides are not bulging or deformed by contents.
description: A plain, light brown paper grocery bag with a flat base, visible creases, and no handles or branding. The bag is empty and has a matte, natural paper finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, rectangular face of the bag with horizontal creases and a straight top edge.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the sharply folded, gusseted side panels and the thin profile of the empty bag.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a similar flat, unadorned surface as the front, with visible creases and no markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the folded gusset and the bag's thinness.
